summary: Reviewed the five listed open pull requests under the opt-in low-signal PR policy using the hydrated preflight artifact. No PR is boringly clear for low-signal closure: each has a scoped implementation, proof/review context, active author follow-up, or a maintainer/product decision that must be preserved outside automated cleanup.
